title: A Call to Spiritual Reformation: Priorities from Paul and His Prayers
author: D.A. Carson
targetAudience: Christian readers, theologians, and individuals seeking spiritual growth
relatedBooks: The Pursuit of God by A.W. Tozer
Praying with Paul by D.A. Carson
The Power of Prayer by E.M. Bounds
keyInsights: Understanding the importance of prayer in spiritual life
Learning from Paul's prayers for personal growth
Prioritizing spiritual disciplines based on biblical teachings
